title: Extend corelib concurrency tests and console package coverage

source.subject: test(corelib): extend concurrency tests and align concurrency packages

body:
## Outcome

Extend concurrency tests and align concurrency packages.

## Context

- Workstream **codegen-runtime** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Fibers, channels, and GC runtime** (`v02-concurrency-runtime`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `corelib`
- **Commit:** [`2ddddb3`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/2ddddb3) — test(corelib): extend concurrency tests and align concurrency packages
